ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which source to use by default when synchronizing titles
ast.target: 选择同步标题时默认使用的来源

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which title locations to sync (which of the three title places to update)
ast.target: 选择要同步的标题位置（更新三个标题位置中的哪一个）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the frontmatter field name for storing the title. Use 'Default' for 'title' or 'Custom' to specify your own.
ast.target: 选择用于存储标题的前置元数据字段名称。使用“默认”表示“title”，或使用“自定义”指定您自己的字段。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the custom frontmatter field name to use for the title. This field will be used instead of 'title'.
ast.target: 指定用于标题的自定义前置元数据字段名称。此字段将用于替代“title”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the old filename is added to the frontmatter aliases array when a file is renamed. This allows Obsidian to resolve links using either the old or new filename.
ast.target: 启用后，当文件重命名时，旧文件名将被添加到前置元数据别名数组中。这允许Obsidian使用旧文件名或新文件名解析链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to handle illegal characters when updating filenames
ast.target: 选择更新文件名时如何处理非法字符

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify a custom character to replace illegal characters with
ast.target: 指定用于替换非法字符的自定义字符

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When updating from frontmatter or heading to filename, also update the source with the sanitized version (without illegal characters)
ast.target: 从前置元数据或标题更新到文件名时，同时使用清理后的版本（不含非法字符）更新来源

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose when to show notifications for sync operations. 'All' shows notifications for both successful syncs and errors. 'Errors only' shows notifications only when sync operations fail. 'None' suppresses all sync notifications.
ast.target: 选择何时显示同步操作的通知。“全部”显示成功同步和错误的通知。“仅错误”仅在同步操作失败时显示通知。“无”则抑制所有同步通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override notification preference specifically for mobile devices. Leave as 'Same as desktop' to use the same setting as above, or choose a different preference for mobile use.
ast.target: 专门针对移动设备覆盖通知偏好设置。保留为“与桌面端相同”以使用上述相同设置，或为移动使用选择不同的偏好设置。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 确认批量标题更新

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠️ You are about to perform a bulk title update operation.
ast.target: ⚠️ 您即将执行批量标题更新操作。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This operation will recursively process all markdown files in the selected folder and its subfolders.
ast.target: 此操作将递归处理所选文件夹及其子文件夹中的所有Markdown文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠️ IMPORTANT: There is no way to automatically revert these changes. Please ensure you have backed up your files before proceeding.
ast.target: ⚠️ 重要提示：无法自动撤消这些更改。请确保在继续之前已备份您的文件。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 取消

ast.name: text
ast.target: 继续进行批量更新
